lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਬੂਝਿ ਲੇ ਤਉ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਬੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee boojh le tau hoe niberaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one comes to understand, and then, the account is settled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ਸੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar naam niranjanaa so tthaakur meraa |1|
lines.english: In each and every heart is the Name of the Immaculate Lord; He is my Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਨ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin gurasabad na chhootteeai dekhahu veechaaraa |
lines.english: Without the Word of the Guru's Shabad, no one is emancipated. See this, and reflect upon it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਹੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: je lakh karam kamaavahee bin gur andhiaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Even though you may perform hundreds of thousands of rituals, without the Guru, there is only darkness. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਅਕਲੀ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: andhe akalee baahare kiaa tin siau kaheeai |
lines.english: What can you say, to one who is blind and without wisdom?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੰਥੁ ਨ ਸੂਝਈ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਨਿਰਬਹੀਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin gur panth na soojhee kit bidh nirabaheeai |2|
lines.english: Without the Guru, the Path cannot be seen. How can anyone proceed? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਰਖੂ ਕਲੀ ਕਾਲ ਵਿਡਾਣੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: andhe kaa naau paarakhoo kalee kaal viddaanai |3|
lines.english: The blind man is known as an appraiser; this Dark Age of Kali Yuga is so strange! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਟੇ ਕਉ ਖਰਾ ਕਹੈ ਖਰੇ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: khotte kau kharaa kahai khare saar na jaanai |
lines.english: He calls the counterfeit genuine, and does not know the value of the genuine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਤੇ ਕਉ ਜਾਗਤੁ ਕਹੈ ਜਾਗਤ ਕਉ ਸੂਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: soote kau jaagat kahai jaagat kau sootaa |
lines.english: The sleeper is said to be awake, and those who are awake are like sleepers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤ ਕਉ ਮੂਆ ਕਹੈ ਮੂਏ ਨਹੀ ਰੋਤਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jeevat kau mooaa kahai mooe nahee rotaa |4|
lines.english: The living are said to be dead, and no one mourns for those who have died. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਕਉ ਜਾਤਾ ਕਹੈ ਜਾਤੇ ਕਉ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavat kau jaataa kahai jaate kau aaeaa |
lines.english: One who is coming is said to be going, and one who is gone is said to have come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਕੀ ਕਉ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਕਹੈ ਅਪੁਨੋ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: par kee kau apunee kahai apuno nahee bhaaeaa |5|
lines.english: That which belongs to others, he calls his own, but he has no liking for that which is his. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤੇ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਐਸਾ ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: raate kee nindaa kareh aisaa kal meh ddeetthaa |6|
lines.english: One who is imbued with the Lord's Love is slandered - this is what I have seen in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਰੀ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਦੀਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: cheree kee sevaa kareh tthaakur nahee deesai |
lines.english: He serves the maid, and does not see his Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੀਠੇ ਕਉ ਕਉੜਾ ਕਹੈ ਕੜੂਏ ਕਉ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: meetthe kau kaurraa kahai karrooe kau meetthaa |
lines.english: That which is sweet is said to be bitter, and the bitter is said to be sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਖਰੁ ਨੀਰੁ ਵਿਰੋਲੀਐ ਮਾਖਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਰੀਸੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: pokhar neer viroleeai maakhan nahee reesai |7|
lines.english: Churning the water in the pond, no butter is produced. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਪਦ ਜੋ ਅਰਥਾਇ ਲੇਇ ਸੋ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eis pad jo arathaae lee so guroo hamaaraa |
lines.english: One who understands the meaning of this verse is my Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚੀਨੈ ਆਪ ਕਉ ਸੋ ਅਪਰ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak cheenai aap kau so apar apaaraa |8|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who knows his own self, is infinite and incomparable. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh aape aap varatadaa aape bharamaaeaa |
lines.english: He Himself is All-pervading; He Himself misleads the people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਬੂਝੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੯॥੨॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te boojheeai sabh braham samaaeaa |9|2|18|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one comes to understand, that God is contained in all. ||9||2||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree guaareree mahalaa 3 asattapadeea |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree, Third Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮੇ ਭੂਲੇ ਆਵਉ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bharame bhoole aavau jaau |1|
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, people come and go in reincarnation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਚਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jichar sabad na bheejai har kai naae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: as long as they do not dwell on the Shabad, and the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa sootak doojaa bhaau |
lines.english: The pollution of the mind is the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sootak kabeh na jaae |
lines.english: The pollution of the self-willed manmukhs will never go away,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਜੇਤਾ ਮੋਹੁ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabho sootak jetaa mohu aakaar |
lines.english: All the created beings are contaminated by emotional attachment;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mar mar jamai vaaro vaar |2|
lines.english: they die and are reborn, only to die over and over again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਤਕਿ ਕਰਮ ਨ ਪੂਜਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sootak karam na poojaa hoe |
lines.english: The actions of those who do not worship the Lord are polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਤਕੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਜੇਤਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਖਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sootak bhojan jetaa kichh khaeh |3|
lines.english: The food which is eaten is polluted. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਤਕੁ ਅਗਨਿ ਪਉਣੈ ਪਾਣੀ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sootak agan paunai paanee maeh |
lines.english: Fire, air and water are polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam rate man niramal hoe |4|
lines.english: Attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind becomes immaculate. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸੋਧਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: saasat sinmrit sodh dekhahu koe |
lines.english: You may study and examine the Shaastras and the Simritees,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਨਮੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਖਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: marai na janamai kaal na khaae |5|
lines.english: and then, one does not suffer death and rebirth, or get devoured by death. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seviai sootak jaae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, pollution is eradicated,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਤਮੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jug chaare naam utam sabad beechaar |
lines.english: Throughout the four ages, the Naam is the ultimate; reflect upon the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: vin naavai ko mukat na hoe |6|
lines.english: but without the Name, no one is liberated. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਤਰਸਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kal meh guramukh utaras paar |7|
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, only the Gurmukhs cross over. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa marai na aavai jaae |
lines.english: The True Lord does not die; He does not come or go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh rahai samaae |8|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh remains absorbed in the Lord. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo raakhahu hiradai ur dhaaraa |
lines.english: Keep the Dear Lord enshrined in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sevaa praan adhaaraa |
lines.english: Selfless service is the support of the breath of life of the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Gauree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਉਤਰਹੁ ਪਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh bhaujal utarahu paaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh crosses over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਸਾਚ ਦੁਆਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh sobhaa saach duaaraa |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is honored in the Court of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਪੜੁ ਤਜਹੁ ਵਿਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: panddit har parr tajahu vikaaraa |
lines.english: O Pandit, O religious scholar, read about the Lord, and renounce your corrupt ways.
